name: Puzzle
description: Puzzle is commonly used to support finance workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use Puzzle when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in finance work.
founderWorkflow: Use Puzzle to keep finance work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding Puzzle before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
